title: White House defends Biden after 'wandering' at G7 event
shortDescription: A clip of Joe Biden walking away from the G7 summit group is getting attention online. A White House spokesperson calls it a mischaracterization.

title: White House slams Biden G7 scrutiny
shortDescription: The White House denied claims that President Joe Biden wandered away from a G7 event.

title: Supreme Court strikes down bump stock ban
shortDescription: The Supreme Court struck down a Trump-era ban on bump stocks, a gun accessory that allows semi-automatic weapons to fire rapidly like machine guns.

title: Liquor licenses at Trump Golf courses under review | Fact check
shortDescription: A New Jersey Attorney General's office review of the impact of Trump's criminal conviction on liquor licenses in the state was ongoing as of June 13.

title: MAGA Boat Parade returns with Trump set to visit Detroit
shortDescription: Boats decked in MAGA gear will sail from Lake St. Clair in Macomb County to the Detroit River on Saturday. The parade will honor Trump's birthday.

title: Hunter Biden drops lawsuit against Rudy Giuliani over infamous laptop
shortDescription: Hunter Biden's laptop helped convict him on gun charges, but he dropped a lawsuit against Rudy Giuliani over it, amid the ex-mayor's bankruptcy

title: House passes pivotal defense bill – with conservative culture war amendments
shortDescription: Democrats have protested that Republicans packed the must-pass bill – a traditionally bipartisan endeavor – with partisan culture war provisions.

title: Trump called Milwaukee 'horrible'. What does crime data tell us?
shortDescription: Donald Trump said Milwaukee is a 'horrible city,' despite it being the host of the RNC in July. Here is what to know about recent crime data.

title: Hunter Biden sues Rudy Giuliani and his former attorney
shortDescription: The president's son claims that the two men hacked and altered data on his external hard drive.

title: Biden protections for LGBTQ+ students blocked in some states by judge
shortDescription: A federal judge in Louisiana on Thursday blocked the Biden administration from enforcing in four states a new rule that protects LGBTQ+ students.

title: Dems dot Milwaukee with billboards after Trump 'horrible city' comment
shortDescription: Congressional Republicans on Thursday said Trump had called Milwaukee a "horrible city" but differed on the context.

title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump-era ban on bump stocks for guns
shortDescription: Clarence Thomas wrote the majority opinion and said a bump stock is like a "lightning-fast trigger finger." Sonia Sotomayor warned of "deadly consequences."

title: California Democrats bet big on abortion in 2024 election
shortDescription: Gavin Newsom's 2028 ambitions are on display as California's most high-profile Democrats double down on abortion rights ahead of Election Day.

title: Map: Voters to decide on abortion-related ballot measures in November
shortDescription: With the November general election a few months away, residents in Colorado, Maryland, South Dakota and Florida will be able to vote on ballot initiatives related to abortion.

title: Trump will appear on Texas ballot despite conviction | Fact check
shortDescription: Not only is the text shown in the post not part of the Texas Constitution, but eligibility for the presidency is decided by the U.S. Constitution.

title: Biden, Zelenskyy announce security agreements
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and President Zelenskyy announced a security agreement at the G7 summit giving Ukraine $50 billion in frozen Russian assets.

title: Biden signs 10-year pact with Ukraine that could be undercut if Trump wins
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's agreement with Ukraine is meant to signal long-term US support but it could be upended by the next election.

title: Senate to vote on 'statutory right' for access to IVF services
shortDescription: A bill that would establish a 'statutory right' for access to IVF services will get a procedural vote in the Senate, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer said.

title: Trump plans activity inside and outside the RNC, campaign says
shortDescription: The campaign also disputed a report that convention planners are preparing for a scenario in which the former president does not attend in person.

title: Takeaways from abortion decision: Supreme Court skirts election year drama
shortDescription: The unanimous ruling was a loss for the anti-abortion movement and a reprieve for the high court, which often splits on ideological lines on hot-button issues.

title: Merchan not 'fired,' no proof Trump verdict was leaked | Fact check
shortDescription: The claim overreaches in describing Merchan's letter that notified lawyers of a Facebook post from someone claiming advance knowledge of the verdict.

title: Biden says he won't pardon son Hunter
shortDescription: President Joe Biden said he would abide by the jury's decision involving his son Hunter Biden, and would not pardon him.

title: President Biden says he won't commute Hunter's sentence in gun case
shortDescription: President Biden told reporters he won't commute the future sentence of his son Hunter Biden after a White House official hadn't ruled it out.
